items.name: bgp_syslog_tail
items.description: Recent BGP-related syslog events

items.name: bgp_notifications
items.description: BGP Cease / hold-timer notifications

items.name: syslog_zebra_nexthop_kernel_failures
items.description: Kernel programming failures (zebra/netlink) that align with dataplane degradation
items.pattern: zebra.*Carrier for nexthop device is down|Failed to install Nexthop ID|netlink.*Network is down|error: Network is down
items.cmd: rg -n -z -H -C 2 "zebra.*Carrier for nexthop device is down|Failed to install Nexthop ID|netlink.*Network is down|error: Network is down" log/syslog*gz 2>/dev/null | tail -n 140

items.name: syslog_bgp_notifications_and_down
items.description: BGP NOTIFICATION/Hold Timer/Interface down events (symptom bundle)
items.pattern: bgp|NOTIFICATION|Hold Timer Expired|Cease|Down Interface down|connection collision
items.cmd: rg -n -z -H -C 2 "bgp|NOTIFICATION|Hold Timer Expired|Cease|Down Interface down|connection collision" log/syslog*gz 2>/dev/null | tail -n 160

items.name: bgp_dump_files
items.description: List BGP-specific dump files

items.name: docker_status
items.description: Docker status and restart status

items.name: kdump_oom_logs
items.description: kdump out of memory logs
items.pattern: out_of_memory|Kernel panic - not syncing|panic_on_oom|Out of memory:|oom-killer|invoked oom-killer|Killed process
items.cmd: rg -n -z -H "out_of_memory|Kernel panic - not syncing|panic_on_oom|Out of memory:|oom-killer|invoked oom-killer|Killed process" kdump/** 2>/dev/null | tail -n 80

items.name: reboot_cause
items.description: reboot cause

items.name: oom_panic_samples_capped
items.description: Kernel panic / OOM proof with context (first ~60 lines)
items.pattern: Kernel panic|panic_on_oom|Out of memory|oom-killer|invoked oom-killer|Killed process|kdump|Kdump
items.cmd: rg -n -z -C 5 "Kernel panic|panic_on_oom|Out of memory|oom-killer|invoked oom-killer|Killed process|kdump|Kdump" log/syslog*gz 2>/dev/null | tail -n 60

items.name: fd_exhaust_last_seen
items.description: Latest file-descriptor exhaustion evidence
items.cmd: rg -n -z "Errno\s*24|Too many open files" log/syslog*gz 2>/dev/null | tail -n 40

items.name: redis_socket_last_seen
items.description: Latest redis unix-socket failures
items.pattern: Unable to connect to redis|unix-socket|Cannot assign requested address
items.cmd: rg -n -z "Unable to connect to redis|redis.*unix-socket|Cannot assign requested address" log/syslog*gz 2>/dev/null | tail -n 40

items.name: snmp_subagent_last_seen
items.description: snmp-subagent / MIBUpdater leak signals

items.name: arp_update_last_seen
items.description: arp_update noise and sonic-db-cli missing warnings
items.cmd: rg -n -z "arp_update|sonic-db-cli: command not found|ping6: Warning" log/syslog*gz 2>/dev/null | tail -n 40

items.name: monit_mem_last_seen
items.description: Latest monit high-memory alarms
items.cmd: rg -n -z "monit\[[0-9]+\].*mem usage|mem usage of [0-9]+\.[0-9]+% matches resource limit" log/syslog*gz 2>/dev/null | tail -n 30

items.name: kdump_rcu_stall_blocking_nodes
items.description: RCU stall + blocking structures (often precedes watchdog panic)
items.pattern: rcu_sched self-detected stall|detected expedited stalls|blocking rcu_node structures
items.cmd: rg -n -z -H -C 2 "rcu_sched self-detected stall|detected expedited stalls|blocking rcu_node structures" kdump/** 2>/dev/null | tail -n 120

items.name: syslog_syncd_not_exit_gracefully_sigkill
items.description: syncd container did not exit gracefully + docker SIGKILL escalation evidence
items.pattern: did not exit gracefully|failed to exit within|trying direct SIGKILL|SIGKILL
items.cmd: rg -n -z -H -C 2 "did not exit gracefully|failed to exit within|trying direct SIGKILL|SIGKILL" log/syslog*gz 2>/dev/null | tail -n 120

items.name: kdump_oom_logs
items.description: kdump out of memory logs
items.pattern: out_of_memory|Kernel panic - not syncing|panic_on_oom|Out of memory:|oom-killer|invoked oom-killer|Killed process
items.cmd: rg -n -z -H "out_of_memory|Kernel panic - not syncing|panic_on_oom|Out of memory:|oom-killer|invoked oom-killer|Killed process" kdump/** 2>/dev/null | tail -n 80

items.name: transceiver_issues
items.description: Optics insertion, removal, and faults

items.name: hardware_sensors
items.description: PSU, Fan, and Thermal alarms

items.name: reboot_cause
items.description: Check previous reboot cause
items.cmd: head -n 20 dump/reboot-cause/* 2>/dev/null || echo 'Reboot cause file not found'

items.name: lacp_errors
items.description: LACP Aggregation failures and timeouts

items.name: link_training
items.description: SerDes/Link training failures (Physical Layer)

items.name: kdump_oom_logs
items.description: kdump out of memory logs
items.pattern: out_of_memory|Kernel panic - not syncing|panic_on_oom|Out of memory:|oom-killer|invoked oom-killer|Killed process
items.cmd: rg -n -z -H "out_of_memory|Kernel panic - not syncing|panic_on_oom|Out of memory:|oom-killer|invoked oom-killer|Killed process" kdump/** 2>/dev/null | tail -n 20

items.name: sonic_version_info
items.description: SONiC OS Version, Platform, ASIC, and (often) Uptime

items.name: show_environment
items.description: Environment snapshot (sensors + fan + PSU status if captured)
items.cmd: echo '== sensors =='; cat dump/sensors 2>/dev/null; echo; echo '== fan =='; cat dump/fan 2>/dev/null; echo; echo '== psustatus =='; cat dump/psustatus 2>/dev/null

items.name: platform_temperature
items.description: Platform temperature output

items.name: platform_firmware_status
items.description: Platform firmware status

items.name: platform_pcieinfo
items.description: PCIe inventory from lspci (closest dump equivalent to 'show platform pcieinfo')

items.name: platform_summary
items.description: Platform summary

items.name: platform_ssdhealth
items.description: SSD health snapshot captured by dump (not smartctl live)

items.name: docker_ps_a
items.description: Docker ps output captured in dump

items.name: docker_stats
items.description: Docker stats snapshot captured in dump

items.name: top_snapshot
items.description: Top output snapshot (includes uptime/load and top CPU/mem offenders)

items.name: processes_snapshot
items.description: Process list snapshot (ps aux) and memory summary
items.cmd: echo '== ps aux (top 80) =='; sed -n '1,80p' dump/ps.aux 2>/dev/null; echo; echo '== free =='; cat dump/free 2>/dev/null; echo; echo '== vmstat =='; cat dump/vmstat 2>/dev/null

items.name: system_health_details
items.description: Service and systemd health proxies from dump
items.cmd: echo '== services.summary =='; cat dump/services.summary 2>/dev/null; echo; echo '== systemd.analyze.blame =='; cat dump/systemd.analyze.blame 2>/dev/null

items.name: reboot_cause
items.description: Reboot cause

items.name: interface_counters_iterations
items.description: Interface counters iterations captured (2 iterations present in this dump)
items.cmd: echo '== interface.counters_1 =='; cat dump/interface.counters_1 2>/dev/null; echo; echo '== interface.counters_2 =='; cat dump/interface.counters_2 2>/dev/null; echo; echo '== ifconfig.counters_1 =='; cat dump/ifconfig.counters_1 2>/dev/null; echo; echo '== ifconfig.counters_2 =='; cat dump/ifconfig.counters_2 2>/dev/null

items.name: oom_killer
items.description: Out of Memory (OOM) Events

items.name: disk_space_warn
items.description: Disk usage warnings
items.cmd: zgrep -Ei 'No space left|filesystem full' log/syslog* | tail -n 20

items.name: docker_status_failures
items.description: List of Docker containers that have Exited (Crashed)

items.name: sai_failures
items.description: SAI (ASIC) Programming Failures - Critical for forwarding

items.name: sonic_version_info
items.description: SONiC OS Version, Platform, ASIC, and Uptime

items.name: sonic_version_info
items.description: SONiC OS Version, Platform, ASIC, and Uptime

items.name: docker_status
items.description: Docker status and restart status

items.name: syslog_syncd_cold_shutdown_sequence
items.description: syncd service stop + cold shutdown requested sequence
items.pattern: Stopping syncd service|Warm boot flag|cold shutdown syncd|syncd_request_shutdown|requested COLD shutdown|swss-syncd-lock
items.cmd: rg -n -z -H -C 2 "Stopping syncd service|Warm boot flag|cold shutdown syncd|syncd_request_shutdown|requested COLD shutdown|swss-syncd-lock" log/syslog*gz 2>/dev/null | rg -v -e "INFO|NOTICE|DEBUG" | tail -n 80

items.name: kernel_hang_signals
items.description: Watchdog, soft-lockup, hung-task, and RCU stall evidence
items.cmd: rg -a -n -z -H -e "watchdog|soft lockup|hung task|blocked for more than|rcu_sched|RCU stall|NMI watchdog|watchdog: BUG: soft lockup|Kernel panic - not syncing|softlockup: hung tasks|rcu: INFO|rcu_sched" log/syslog*gz kdump/* 2>/dev/null | rg -v -e "INFO|NOTICE|DEBUG" | tail -n 80

items.name: redis_db_corruption_signals
items.description: Redis / DB corruption, persistence, and timeout signals
items.cmd: rg -a -n -z -H -e "redis.*(RDB|AOF|corrupt|checksum|Loading)|rocksdb|COUNTERS_DB|db.*timeout|Failed.*DB|Unable to persist" log/syslog*gz 2>/dev/null | rg -v -e "INFO|NOTICE|DEBUG" | tail -n 80

items.name: bgp_neighbor_reason_extract
items.description: BGP neighbor state changes with reasons
items.cmd: rg -a -n -z -H -e "BGP_STATE_CHANGED|Hold Timer|Cease|NOTIFICATION|BFD.*(Down|timeout)|frr|bgpd.*(restart|exited)|zebra.*(restart|exited)" log/bgpd* log/zebra* log/syslog*gz 2>/dev/null | rg -v -e "INFO|NOTICE|DEBUG" | tail -n 80

items.name: reboot_cause
items.description: reboot cause

items.name: syncd_warmboot_failures
items.description: syncd crashes, warmboot failures, and ASIC init errors

items.name: dump_identity_quick
items.description: Quick identity: version + reboot-cause headers + newest syslog files (tiny)
items.cmd: set -e; echo '== dump/version (top 40) =='; sed -n '1,40p' dump/version 2>/dev/null || echo 'dump/version not found'; echo; echo '== reboot-cause (top 20) =='; sed -n '1,20p' dump/reboot-cause/* 2>/dev/null || echo 'dump/reboot-cause not found'; echo; echo '== newest syslog files =='; ls -1t log/syslog*gz 2>/dev/null | head -n 5 || echo 'no log/syslog*gz'

items.name: storage_io_filesystem_errors
items.description: Disk full, read-only FS, ext4/jbd2, and I/O errors
items.cmd: rg -a -n -z -H -e "No space left|ENOSPC|Read-only file system|EXT4-fs error|jbd2|I/O error|Buffer I/O error|journal.*(failed|corrupt)|systemd-journald.*(fail|corrupt)" log/syslog*gz 2>/dev/null | tail -n 80

items.name: platform_i2c_power_thermal
items.description: I2C timeouts, PSU brownouts, and thermal shutdown events

items.name: newest_syslog_tail_micro
items.description: Micro tail of newest syslog files to reveal messages without dumping everything

items.name: ifcounters_txt
items.description: Interface counters from ticket-level text dumps
items.cmd: for f in *'show interface counters'*.txt; do if [ -f "$f" ]; then echo '==== '"$f"' ===='; sed -n '1,40p' "$f"; echo; fi; done 2>/dev/null || true
